name: @xpaysh/acp-schemas
description: JSON Schemas for the Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP), vendored from the upstream Apache-2.0 spec at agentic-commerce-protocol/agentic-commerce-protocol (rev 2026-04-17). Bundles: agentic_checkout, cart, delegate_authentication, delegate_payment, discount, extension, feed. Zero deps. Consumed by xpaysh/agentic-commerce-for-* plugins.
author: xpay✦ <hello@xpay.sh>
